messages.content: translate ハンター志望者に 配られる通知 これには 試験開始の日時と 大雑把な場所 だけしか 記されていない
Notification distributed to aspiring hunters. Only the date and time of the exam and a rough location are written in this.
translate あちちいき
I'm sorry, but "あちちいき" doesn't seem to be a recognizable Japanese phrase. Could you please provide additional context or check for any spelling errors?
it is like on road sign showing direction of something

Based on your description, "あちちいき" seems to be a misspelling or an unclear phrase. However, if you mean "あちら方向" (achira hōkō), it translates to "that direction" or "over there." This phrase is commonly used on road signs to indicate a particular direction or location.
translate すげェ 人だな えーと ザバン市に 向かう 乗り物は．．．
Wow, that's amazing! Um, the transportation to head towards Zaban City is...

translate そりゃ おかしいぜ
見ろよ
会場がある ザバン地区は 地図にも ちゃんと乗ってる デカイ都市だぜ
Well, that's strange. Take a look. Zaban District, where the venue is located, is a large city clearly marked on the map.

translate 彼の かんちがいでは ないのか？
とりあえず オレは 行ってみる
きっと 何か理由が あるんだよ
Is it not just a misunderstanding on his part? Anyway, I'll go and see for myself. There must be some reason behind it.

translate ゴンよ お前少しは 人を疑うことを 覚えた方が いいぜ
オレは バスで行く ことを すすめるね
Gon, you should learn to be a bit more suspicious of people. I recommend you go by bus.

translate 船長の言葉．．．というよりも
ゴンの 行動に興味が あるね
I'm more interested in Gon's actions than in what the captain said.

translate オレは 地道にバスで 向かう
じゃーな 短いつき合い だったが 元気でな
I will diligently make my way there by bus. Well then, our time together was short, but take care and stay well.

translate おい どーも ザバン直行便の バスは 一台も 目的地に到着 してないらしいぜ
やはり罠か．．．初受験者は バカ正直だから たいがい これで 脱落するぜ

Hey, it seems that none of the direct buses to Zaban have arrived at their destination. It must be a trap after all... First-time examinees are usually too honest, so most of them will probably be eliminated by this.
translate しょーがねーなァオレもつき合ってやるよ
I can't help it. I'll join you too.
translate ドキドキ2択 クイ～～～え！！
Heart-pounding two choices? Quiz... eh!!!
